config.title: Operacja na transakcji #ifdef _DEBUG [THIS_FILE] #endif
config.script:
#include "50200" 'section_ #include "50222"
function fopen() fopen = true if not page_.root.trop_pTransakcja is nothing then trans_.var(GVAR_ID_TRANS) = clng(page_.root.trop_pTransakcja.idobj) end if end function
function fenableedit page_.enableedit = not page_.enableedit end function
function fback page_.goback end function
function fclose trans_.var(GVAR_ID_TRANS) = clng(0) end function
QVE_REF_OPEN_FORM_TRANS(CTRLID_DOKUMENT,trop_wrefDokument)
QVE_CURRENCY_CUSTOM_PRICE_TRANS(CTRLID_WN_WALUTA,page_.root.trop_curWn,1) QVE_CURRENCY_CUSTOM_PRICE_TRANS(CTRLID_MA_WALUTA,page_.root.trop_curMa,1) QVE_CURRENCY_CUSTOM_PRICE(CTRLID_WN_KRAJ,page_.root.trop_curWnEwid,getCurrentFirma().pWaluta,1) QVE_CURRENCY_CUSTOM_PRICE(CTRLID_MA_KRAJ,page_.root.trop_curMaEwid,getCurrentFirma().pWaluta,1)
#if TRF_SHOW_KWOTA_VAT = 1 QVE_CURRENCY_CUSTOM_PRICE(CTRLID_WN_VAT,page_.root.trop_curWnVAT,getCurrentFirma().pWaluta,1) QVE_CURRENCY_CUSTOM_PRICE(CTRLID_MA_VAT,page_.root.trop_curMaVAT,getCurrentFirma().pWaluta,1) #endif
QVX_WPROWADZIL_MODYFIKOWAL(CTRLID_UZYTKREJ,CTRLID_UZYTKMODYF,trop_pUzytRej,trop_pUzytModyf)
function std_openform_field_hli_trans(byref pHLI) dim strRefFldName : strRefFldName = pHLI.prop(1) dim pRefObject : set pRefObject = page_.root.field(strRefFldName) if pRefObject is nothing then exit function else 'zmiana sposobu wywołania formularza z dokumentem oryginalnym (w przypadku pozycji) select case pRefObject.type case TYPEID_N5POZRATA set pRefObject = getRefObjPozRata(pRefObject.idobj) case TYPEID_N5POZPLATNOSC set pRefObject = getRefObjPozPlatnosc(pRefObject.idobj) end select
if not pRefObject is nothing then doc_.postcommand doc_.afc.convert.formatter("OPEN_FORM_PROXY_HLI_USAGE(%1,%2,USAGE_VIEW) ") _ .add(cstr(pRefObject.type)).add(cstr(pRefObject.idobj)).done() end if end if end function
function std_choice_wildref_hli_trans(hli) dim strFldName : strFldName =cstr(hli.prop(1)) dim strOrders : strOrders =cstr(hli.prop(2)) dim strWheres : strWheres =cstr(hli.prop(3))
dim pPageSuggest : set pPageSuggest = doc_.getmodule(43002)
dim nObjectId : nObjectId = pPageSuggest.wildref_choose(page_.root, strFldName, strOrders, strWheres)
if (nObjectId > 0) then 'zmiana sposobu pobierania obiektu w przypadku pozycji (pozrata, pozplatnosc, dekret) dim pParentObj, nLP select case pPageSuggest.getTypeID() case TYPEID_N5POZRATA set pParentObj = getRefObjPozRata(nObjectId) if not pParentObj is nothing then if pParentObj.type = TYPEID_N5SPRZEDAZ then nLP = pParentObj.sprzed_listRata.findonid(nObjectId) set page_.root.field(strFldName) = pParentObj.sprzed_listRata.get(nLP) elseif pParentObj.type = TYPEID_N5ZAKUP then nLP = pParentObj.zak_listRata.findonid(nObjectId) set page_.root.field(strFldName) = pParentObj.zak_listRata.get(nLP) else nLP = pParentObj.zam_listRata.findonid(nObjectId) set page_.root.field(strFldName) = pParentObj.zam_listRata.get(nLP) end if end if case TYPEID_N5POZPLATNOSC set pParentObj = getRefObjPozPlatnosc(nObjectId) if not pParentObj is nothing then nLP = pParentObj.listPozycje.findonid(nObjectId) set page_.root.field(strFldName) = pParentObj.listPozycje.get(nLP) end if case TYPEID_N5DEKRET set pParentObj = getRefObjPozDowod(nObjectId) if not pParentObj is nothing then nLP = pParentObj.listDekret.findonid(nObjectId) set page_.root.field(strFldName) = pParentObj.listDekret.get(nLP) end if case else set page_.root.field(strFldName) = trans_.getobj(pPageSuggest.getTypeID(), nObjectId) end select end if end function
function getRefObjPozRata(idObj): set getRefObjPozRata = nothing if idObj > clng(0) then dim oRS set oRS = trans_.createadors("select p_idobj from vlist_n5sprzedaz_sprzed_listRata where c_idobj = " + CStr(idObj)) if oRS.recordCount > clng(0) then set getRefObjPozRata = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5SPRZEDAZ,clng(oRS(0).value)) else set oRS = trans_.createadors("select p_idobj from vlist_n5zakup_zak_listRata where c_idobj = " + CStr(idObj)) if oRS.recordCount > clng(0) then set getRefObjPozRata = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5ZAKUP,clng(oRS(0).value)) else set oRS = trans_.createadors("select p_idobj from vlist_n5zamowienie_zam_listRata where c_idobj = " + CStr(idObj)) if oRS.recordCount > clng(0) then set getRefObjPozRata = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5ZAMOWIENIE,clng(oRS(0).value)) end if end if end if end if end function
function getRefObjPozPlatnosc(idObj) if idObj > clng(0) then dim oRS set oRS = trans_.createadors("select p_idobj from vlist_n5platnosc_listPozycje where c_idobj = " + CStr(idObj)) if oRS.recordCount > clng(0) then set getRefObjPozPlatnosc = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5PLATNOSC,clng(oRS(0).value)) end if end if end function
function getRefObjPozDowod(idObj) if idObj > clng(0) then dim oRS set oRS = trans_.createadors("select p_idobj from vlist_n5dowodksieg_listDekret where c_idobj = " + CStr(idObj)) if oRS.recordCount > clng(0) then set getRefObjPozDowod = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5DOWODKSIEG,clng(oRS(0).value)) end if end if end function
function c##CTRLID_EDIT_CUST##_ongetdata(byref pCtrl): c##CTRLID_EDIT_CUST##_ongetdata = true if not page_.root.trop_wrefDokument is nothing then dim strNrDok: strNrDok = "" select case page_.root.trop_wrefDokument.type case TYPEID_N5SPRZEDAZ,TYPEID_N5ZAKUP strNrDok = page_.root.trop_wrefDokument.strNrDok case TYPEID_N5POZPLATNOSC if not page_.root.trop_wrefDokument.parent is nothing then strNrDok = page_.root.trop_wrefDokument.parent.strNrDok else strNrDok = page_.root.trop_wrefDokument.n5pozplatnosc_as_text end if case TYPEID_N5POZRATA if not page_.root.trop_wrefDokument.parent is nothing then strNrDok = page_.root.trop_wrefDokument.parent.strNrDok else strNrDok = page_.root.trop_wrefDokument.n5pozrata_as_text end if case TYPEID_N5DEKRET if not page_.root.trop_wrefDokument.parent is nothing then strNrDok = page_.root.trop_wrefDokument.parent.strNrDok else strNrDok = page_.root.trop_wrefDokument.n5dekret_as_text end if case TYPEID_N5PLNALICZENIE strNrDok = page_.root.trop_wrefDokument.pListaPlac.strNrDok end select pCtrl.value = strNrDok end if end function
function c##CTRLID_EDIT_CUST##_ondataentered(byref pCtrl,value): c##CTRLID_EDIT_CUST##_ondataentered = true end function

page.body:
QXF_BEGIN
QXE_LABEL_OPEN(CTRLID_DOKUMENT,Dokument)
QXE_EDIT_WILDREF_DELONLY_CUST(CTRLID_EDIT_CUST,40,) QXE_PICTURE_CHOICE_WILDREF_TRANS(PICTURE_WYBOR,trop_wrefDokument,strNrDok;strNrDok;prat_pTransakcja;pTransakcja;pTransakcja;strOpis,)
QXC_LABEL_REQ(Data operacji,1)
QXE_DATE_FIELD(-1,trop_dDataOp)
QXR_SEPARATOR(FORM_SPAN)
QXC_LABEL(Kwota,1) QXC_LABEL(Winien,1) QXC_LABEL(Ma,1) QXC_LABEL(Kurs,1)
QXC_LABEL(w walucie transakcji,1) QXC_CURRENCY_CUSTOM(CTRLID_WN_WALUTA,15,2,,1)
QXE_CURRENCY_CUSTOM(CTRLID_MA_WALUTA,15,2,)
QXE_CURRENCY_FIELD(-1,8,4,,trop_curKursOp,)
#if TRF_SHOW_KWOTA_VAT = 1
QXC_LABEL(w tym VAT,1) QXC_CURRENCY_CUSTOM(CTRLID_WN_VAT,15,2,,1) QXC_CURRENCY_CUSTOM(CTRLID_MA_VAT,15,2,,2)
#endif
QXC_LABEL(w walucie rachunkowości,1) QXC_CURRENCY_CUSTOM(CTRLID_WN_KRAJ,15,2,,1) QXC_CURRENCY_CUSTOM(CTRLID_MA_KRAJ,15,2,,2)
QXR_SEPARATOR(FORM_SPAN)
QXS_MULTILINE(SECID_OPIS,CTRLID_OPIS,trop_strOpis,Opis,FORM_SPAN)
QXR_SEPARATOR(FORM_SPAN)
QXX_WPROWADZIL_MODYFIKOWAL(CTRLID_UZYTKREJ,CTRLID_UZYTKMODYF,trop_pUzytRej,trop_pUzytModyf,2)
QXF_END
